requirement_topic.en: EMC Directive 2014/30/EU & RED EMC Essential Requirement — EN 301 489 Series (Finland / Traficom / Tukes)
requirement_topic.zh: EMC指令2014/30/EU及RED电磁兼容基本要求 — EN 301 489系列（芬兰 / Traficom / Tukes）
requirement_topic.zht: EMC指令2014/30/EU及RED電磁相容基本要求 — EN 301 489系列（芬蘭 / Traficom / Tukes）

summary.en: Electromagnetic compatibility (EMC) is an essential requirement under RED 2014/53/EU Article 3.1(b) for all radio equipment placed on the Finnish market. For wireless devices (Wi-Fi, Bluetooth, IoT), EMC conformity is typically demonstrated by testing to the EN 301 489 harmonised standard series: EN 301 489-1 (common technical requirements for radio equipment) in combination with the applicable device-specific part — EN 301 489-17 for wideband data and RLAN (Wi-Fi, Bluetooth), EN 301 489-3 for short-range devices, EN 301 489-52 for LTE/5G NR cellular equipment. The EMC Directive 2014/30/EU applies separately to non-radio electronic equipment; for devices that are purely wireless under RED, EMC is assessed within the RED framework, but the underlying test limits and methodologies (conducted and radiated emissions; immunity to radiated, conducted, and electrostatic discharge disturbances) align with the EMC Directive standards. In Finland, Traficom is responsible for spectrum-related EMC enforcement (radio interference), while Tukes (Safety and Chemicals Agency / Turvallisuus- ja kemikaalivirasto) handles product safety and general electrical product surveillance, including non-radio EMC matters. EMC conformity must be documented in the EU Declaration of Conformity and supported by technical documentation retained for 10 years.
summary.zh: 电磁兼容性（EMC）是RED 2014/53/EU第3.1(b)条对所有投放芬兰市场无线电设备的基本要求。对于无线设备（Wi-Fi、蓝牙、物联网），EMC合规通常通过按EN 301 489协调标准系列检测来证明：EN 301 489-1（无线电设备通用技术要求）结合适用的设备专项部分——宽带数据和RLAN（Wi-Fi、蓝牙）适用EN 301 489-17；短距离设备适用EN 301 489-3；LTE/5G NR蜂窝设备适用EN 301 489-52。EMC指令2014/30/EU单独适用于非无线电子设备；对于RED下纯属无线的设备，EMC在RED框架内进行评估，但基础测试限值和方法（传导和辐射发射；对辐射、传导和静电放电干扰的抗扰性）与EMC指令标准一致。在芬兰，Traficom负责频谱相关的EMC执法（无线电干扰），而Tukes（安全和化学品局）负责产品安全和一般电气产品监管，包括非无线EMC事项。EMC合规须在欧盟合格声明中记录，并以保存10年的技术文件为支撑。
summary.zht: 電磁相容性（EMC）是RED 2014/53/EU第3.1(b)條對所有投放芬蘭市場無線電設備的基本要求。對於無線設備（Wi-Fi、藍牙、物聯網），EMC合規通常通過按EN 301 489協調標準系列檢測來證明：EN 301 489-1（無線電設備通用技術要求）結合適用的設備專項部分——寬頻數據和RLAN（Wi-Fi、藍牙）適用EN 301 489-17；短距離設備適用EN 301 489-3；LTE/5G NR蜂窩設備適用EN 301 489-52。EMC指令2014/30/EU單獨適用於非無線電子設備；對於RED下純屬無線的設備，EMC在RED框架內進行評估，但基礎測試限值和方法（傳導和輻射發射；對輻射、傳導和靜電放電干擾的抗擾性）與EMC指令標準一致。在芬蘭，Traficom負責頻譜相關的EMC執法（無線電干擾），而Tukes（安全和化學品局）負責產品安全和一般電氣產品監管，包括非無線EMC事項。EMC合規須在歐盟合格聲明中記錄，並以保存10年的技術文件為支撐。

standards_or_laws: Directive 2014/53/EU (RED), Art. 3.1(b) — EMC essential requirement for radio equipment
Directive 2014/30/EU (EMC Directive) — applies to non-radio electronic equipment; aligned test methodologies
EN 301 489-1 v2.2.3 — Common technical requirements for radio equipment (EMC framework)
EN 301 489-17 v3.2.4 — Specific conditions for Wideband Data and RLAN equipment (Wi-Fi, Bluetooth)
EN 301 489-3 v2.3.2 — Specific conditions for Short Range Devices (SRD)
EN 301 489-52 v1.2.1 — Specific conditions for LTE / 5G NR cellular equipment
CISPR 32 / EN 55032 — Multimedia equipment emissions (reference standard for emission limits)

summary.en: China's EMC requirements for wireless devices are covered under CCC (China Compulsory Certification) and the associated GB EMC standards. For Wi-Fi and Bluetooth products, the relevant Chinese EMC standards include GB/T 9254 (information technology equipment emissions, aligned with CISPR 32) and GB/T 17626 series (EMC immunity tests, aligned with IEC 61000-4 series). CCC EMC testing is performed by CNAS-accredited Chinese laboratories to Chinese GB standard limits. While the test methodologies share common roots with CISPR/IEC standards, the specific limits, test configurations, frequency ranges, and pass/fail criteria differ from EN 301 489 requirements. CCC EMC compliance is not recognised by Traficom, Tukes, or any EU authority, and does not satisfy RED EMC essential requirement testing obligations.
summary.zh: 中国无线设备的EMC要求通过CCC（中国强制认证）和相关GB EMC标准进行覆盖。对于Wi-Fi和蓝牙产品，相关中国EMC标准包括GB/T 9254（信息技术设备发射，与CISPR 32接轨）和GB/T 17626系列（EMC抗扰度测试，与IEC 61000-4系列接轨）。CCC EMC检测由CNAS认可的中国实验室按中国GB标准限值进行。尽管测试方法与CISPR/IEC标准有共同基础，但具体限值、测试配置、频率范围和合格判定标准与EN 301 489要求不同。CCC EMC合规不被Traficom、Tukes或任何欧盟机构认可，亦不满足RED EMC基本要求检测义务。
summary.zht: 中國無線設備的EMC要求通過CCC（中國強制認證）和相關GB EMC標準進行覆蓋。對於Wi-Fi和藍牙產品，相關中國EMC標準包括GB/T 9254（信息技術設備發射，與CISPR 32接軌）和GB/T 17626系列（EMC抗擾度測試，與IEC 61000-4系列接軌）。CCC EMC檢測由CNAS認可的中國實驗室按中國GB標準限值進行。儘管測試方法與CISPR/IEC標準有共同基礎，但具體限值、測試配置、頻率範圍和合格判定標準與EN 301 489要求不同。CCC EMC合規不被Traficom、Tukes或任何歐盟機構認可，亦不滿足RED EMC基本要求檢測義務。

standards_or_laws: CCC (China Compulsory Certification) — CNCA/SAC; covers EMC for consumer electronics sold in China
GB/T 9254-2021 — Information technology equipment emissions (aligned with CISPR 32; Chinese limits may differ)
GB/T 17626 series — EMC immunity tests (aligned with IEC 61000-4 series; test levels may differ)
GB 4343.1-2009 — Household appliances EMC; emissions (Chinese standard)

gap.en: CCC EMC certification to Chinese GB standards is not equivalent to EN 301 489 conformity and is not recognised by Traficom or Tukes. The primary gap is that EN 301 489 combines general EMC limits (emissions and immunity) with radio-specific conditions for each wireless technology — a combination that Chinese CCC EMC testing does not replicate. Key delta areas include: (1) Frequency coverage — EN 301 489-17 specifies radiated emission limits and immunity test frequencies tailored to Wi-Fi and Bluetooth coexistence in the EU band plan, which differ from Chinese GB limits; (2) Immunity tests — ESD (EN 61000-4-2), radiated immunity (EN 61000-4-3), EFT/burst (EN 61000-4-4), and surge (EN 61000-4-5) must be conducted to EN 301 489 levels; Chinese CCC levels may not match; (3) DFS-related EMC — 5 GHz radar interference avoidance (DFS) has EMC implications; EN 301 489-17 in conjunction with EN 301 893 covers this; Chinese standards do not have a direct equivalent for EU radar protection bands. Manufacturers must obtain EU-recognised EMC test reports (from accredited EU or ILAC/MRA member laboratories) to support CE marking. Traficom handles radio interference complaints; Tukes handles general product safety market surveillance including EMC for non-radio equipment.
gap.zh: 按中国GB标准取得的CCC EMC认证与EN 301 489合规不等效，不被Traficom或Tukes认可。主要差距在于EN 301 489将通用EMC限值（发射和抗扰度）与每种无线技术的无线电专项条件相结合——这是中国CCC EMC检测无法复制的组合。关键差异领域包括：（1）频率覆盖——EN 301 489-17规定针对欧盟频率规划中Wi-Fi和蓝牙共存的辐射发射限值和抗扰度测试频率，与中国GB限值不同；（2）抗扰度测试——须按EN 301 489限值进行ESD（EN 61000-4-2）、辐射抗扰度（EN 61000-4-3）、EFT/脉冲群（EN 61000-4-4）和浪涌（EN 61000-4-5）测试；中国CCC限值可能不一致；（3）DFS相关EMC——5 GHz雷达干扰规避（DFS）具有EMC影响；EN 301 489-17结合EN 301 893涵盖此内容；中国标准对欧盟雷达保护频段无直接等效项。制造商须取得欧盟认可的EMC测试报告（来自获认可的欧盟或ILAC/MRA成员实验室）以支撑CE标志。Traficom处理无线电干扰投诉；Tukes负责一般产品安全市场监管，包括非无线电设备的EMC事项。
gap.zht: 按中國GB標準取得的CCC EMC認證與EN 301 489合規不等效，不被Traficom或Tukes認可。主要差距在於EN 301 489將通用EMC限值（發射和抗擾度）與每種無線技術的無線電專項條件相結合——這是中國CCC EMC檢測無法複製的組合。關鍵差異領域包括：（1）頻率覆蓋——EN 301 489-17規定針對歐盟頻率規劃中Wi-Fi和藍牙共存的輻射發射限值和抗擾度測試頻率，與中國GB限值不同；（2）抗擾度測試——須按EN 301 489限值進行ESD（EN 61000-4-2）、輻射抗擾度（EN 61000-4-3）、EFT/脈衝群（EN 61000-4-4）和浪涌（EN 61000-4-5）測試；中國CCC限值可能不一致；（3）DFS相關EMC——5 GHz雷達干擾規避（DFS）具有EMC影響；EN 301 489-17結合EN 301 893涵蓋此內容；中國標準對歐盟雷達保護頻段無直接等效項。製造商須取得歐盟認可的EMC測試報告（來自獲認可的歐盟或ILAC/MRA成員實驗室）以支撐CE標誌。Traficom處理無線電干擾投訴；Tukes負責一般產品安全市場監管，包括非無線電設備的EMC事項。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — RED 2014/53/EU Art. 3.1(b) essential requirement; EN 301 489 series provides harmonised conformity pathway; enforced by Traficom (radio EMC) and Tukes (general product safety EMC) in Finland
mandatory_status.cn: CCC EMC testing to GB standards is mandatory for the Chinese domestic market but is not recognised in Finland or the EU

source.publisher: EUR-Lex / Official Journal of the European Union

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] EMC conformity to EN 301 489-1 combined with the applicable device-specific part (EN 301 489-17 for Wi-Fi/Bluetooth; EN 301 489-3 for SRD; EN 301 489-52 for LTE/5G NR) is mandatory for CE marking in Finland. CCC EMC certification to Chinese GB standards is not recognised. Test reports from accredited laboratories (EU or ILAC/MRA member) are required to support the EU DoC. Traficom and Tukes share enforcement responsibility in Finland; Tukes may inspect products at the market level and can order withdrawal for EMC non-compliance.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 符合EN 301 489-1及适用设备专项部分（Wi-Fi/蓝牙适用EN 301 489-17；短距离设备适用EN 301 489-3；LTE/5G NR适用EN 301 489-52）的EMC合规是芬兰CE标志的强制要求。按中国GB标准取得的CCC EMC认证不被认可。须提供获认可实验室（欧盟或ILAC/MRA成员）的测试报告以支撑欧盟合格声明。Traficom和Tukes在芬兰共同承担执法责任；Tukes可在市场层面检查产品，并可对EMC不合规产品下令撤市。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 符合EN 301 489-1及適用設備專項部分（Wi-Fi/藍牙適用EN 301 489-17；短距離設備適用EN 301 489-3；LTE/5G NR適用EN 301 489-52）的EMC合規是芬蘭CE標誌的強制要求。按中國GB標準取得的CCC EMC認證不被認可。須提供獲認可實驗室（歐盟或ILAC/MRA成員）的測試報告以支撐歐盟合格聲明。Traficom和Tukes在芬蘭共同承擔執法責任；Tukes可在市場層面檢查產品，並可對EMC不合規產品下令撤市。

requirement_topic.en: RoHS 2 Directive (2011/65/EU) & REACH Regulation — Hazardous Substance Restrictions for Wireless Devices (Finland / Tukes)
requirement_topic.zh: RoHS 2指令（2011/65/EU）及REACH法规 — 无线设备有害物质限制（芬兰 / Tukes）
requirement_topic.zht: RoHS 2指令（2011/65/EU）及REACH法規 — 無線設備有害物質限制（芬蘭 / Tukes）

summary.en: Wireless and IoT devices placed on the Finnish market must comply with the RoHS 2 Directive (2011/65/EU, as amended by 2015/863/EU) and the REACH Regulation (EC No 1907/2006). RoHS 2 restricts the use of ten hazardous substances in electrical and electronic equipment (EEE): lead (Pb), mercury (Hg), cadmium (Cd), hexavalent chromium (Cr VI), polybrominated biphenyls (PBB), polybrominated diphenyl ethers (PBDE), and four phthalates (DEHP, BBP, DBP, DIBP — added by Directive 2015/863/EU, applicable from 22 July 2019). Maximum concentration values are 0.1% by weight in homogeneous materials (except cadmium: 0.01%). Manufacturers must self-declare RoHS 2 compliance in the EU Declaration of Conformity; a CE marking precondition. REACH Regulation imposes obligations regarding substances of very high concern (SVHCs) in articles — if a product contains more than 0.1% w/w of an SVHC on the ECHA Candidate List, the supplier must provide information to professional users, and consumers must be informed on request within 45 days. Tukes (Safety and Chemicals Agency) is the Finnish authority responsible for market surveillance of RoHS 2 and REACH compliance for consumer products, including wireless and IoT devices.
summary.zh: 投放芬兰市场的无线及物联网设备须符合RoHS 2指令（2011/65/EU，经2015/863/EU修订）和REACH法规（EC No 1907/2006）。RoHS 2限制在电气电子设备（EEE）中使用十种有害物质：铅（Pb）、汞（Hg）、镉（Cd）、六价铬（Cr VI）、多溴联苯（PBB）、多溴二苯醚（PBDE），以及四种邻苯二甲酸酯（DEHP、BBP、DBP、DIBP——由指令2015/863/EU增加，自2019年7月22日起适用）。均质材料中最大浓度值为重量百分比0.1%（镉除外：0.01%）。制造商须在欧盟合格声明中自我声明RoHS 2合规；这是CE标志的前提条件。REACH法规对物品中高度关注物质（SVHC）规定了义务——如产品含有ECHA候选清单中SVHC超过0.1% w/w，供应商须向专业用户提供信息，并须在45天内应消费者要求告知。Tukes（安全和化学品局）是负责对消费品（包括无线及物联网设备）进行RoHS 2和REACH合规市场监管的芬兰主管机构。
summary.zht: 投放芬蘭市場的無線及物聯網設備須符合RoHS 2指令（2011/65/EU，經2015/863/EU修訂）和REACH法規（EC No 1907/2006）。RoHS 2限制在電氣電子設備（EEE）中使用十種有害物質：鉛（Pb）、汞（Hg）、鎘（Cd）、六價鉻（Cr VI）、多溴聯苯（PBB）、多溴二苯醚（PBDE），以及四種鄰苯二甲酸酯（DEHP、BBP、DBP、DIBP——由指令2015/863/EU增加，自2019年7月22日起適用）。均質材料中最大濃度值為重量百分比0.1%（鎘除外：0.01%）。製造商須在歐盟合格聲明中自我聲明RoHS 2合規；這是CE標誌的前提條件。REACH法規對物品中高度關注物質（SVHC）規定了義務——如產品含有ECHA候選清單中SVHC超過0.1% w/w，供應商須向專業用戶提供信息，並須在45天內應消費者要求告知。Tukes（安全和化學品局）是負責對消費品（包括無線及物聯網設備）進行RoHS 2和REACH合規市場監管的芬蘭主管機構。

standards_or_laws: Directive 2011/65/EU (RoHS 2) — Restriction of Hazardous Substances in EEE; CE marking precondition
Directive 2015/863/EU — Amends RoHS 2 Annex II; adds four phthalates (DEHP, BBP, DBP, DIBP)
Regulation (EC) No 1907/2006 (REACH) — Registration, Evaluation, Authorisation and Restriction of Chemicals; SVHC obligations for articles
EN IEC 63000:2018 — Technical documentation for assessment of EEE with respect to the restriction of hazardous substances
Tukes — Finnish authority for RoHS 2 and REACH market surveillance

summary.en: China has domestic hazardous substance restrictions for electronic products under the Management Methods for Restriction of Hazardous Substances in Electrical and Electronic Products (Order No. 32, Ministry of Industry and Information Technology, 2016 — commonly referred to as China RoHS 2). China RoHS 2 restricts the same six original RoHS substances (Pb, Hg, Cd, Cr VI, PBB, PBDE) but has not yet adopted the four phthalates added by EU RoHS 2 Directive 2015/863/EU for all product categories. The China RoHS 2 system uses SJ/T 11364-2014 for marking requirements (the hazardous substance marking on the product and product manual) and GB/T 26572-2011 for concentration limits. CCC certification in China covers some hazardous substance restrictions for certain product categories but does not include the EU-specific phthalate restrictions. The Chinese regulatory framework does not include a REACH equivalent; there is no direct Chinese analogue to the ECHA Candidate List SVHC disclosure obligation for articles. China has separate GB standards for chemical restrictions in specific product types (e.g., toy chemicals under GB 6675 series) but these do not replicate the EU REACH framework for electronics.
summary.zh: 中国依据《电器电子产品有害物质限制使用管理办法》（工业和信息化部2016年第32号令，通称中国RoHS 2）对电子产品有害物质实施国内限制。中国RoHS 2限制与欧盟RoHS相同的六种原始有害物质（Pb、Hg、Cd、Cr VI、PBB、PBDE），但尚未针对所有产品类别采纳欧盟RoHS 2指令2015/863/EU增加的四种邻苯二甲酸酯。中国RoHS 2体系使用SJ/T 11364-2014进行标注要求（产品及产品说明书上的有害物质标识）和GB/T 26572-2011规定浓度限值。中国CCC认证涵盖特定产品类别的部分有害物质限制，但不包含欧盟特定的邻苯二甲酸酯限制。中国监管框架不包含REACH等效项；中国无直接等效于ECHA候选清单SVHC物品披露义务的法规。中国对特定产品类型的化学品限制有单独的GB标准（如玩具化学品适用GB 6675系列），但这些标准未复制适用于电子产品的欧盟REACH框架。
summary.zht: 中國依據《電器電子產品有害物質限制使用管理辦法》（工業和信息化部2016年第32號令，通稱中國RoHS 2）對電子產品有害物質實施國內限制。中國RoHS 2限制與歐盟RoHS相同的六種原始有害物質（Pb、Hg、Cd、Cr VI、PBB、PBDE），但尚未針對所有產品類別採納歐盟RoHS 2指令2015/863/EU增加的四種鄰苯二甲酸酯。中國RoHS 2體系使用SJ/T 11364-2014進行標注要求（產品及產品說明書上的有害物質標識）和GB/T 26572-2011規定濃度限值。中國CCC認證涵蓋特定產品類別的部分有害物質限制，但不包含歐盟特定的鄰苯二甲酸酯限制。中國監管框架不包含REACH等效項；中國無直接等效於ECHA候選清單SVHC物品披露義務的法規。中國對特定產品類型的化學品限制有單獨的GB標準（如玩具化學品適用GB 6675系列），但這些標準未複製適用於電子產品的歐盟REACH框架。

standards_or_laws: China RoHS 2 — MIIT Order No. 32 (2016); restricts 6 original RoHS substances; phthalates not fully adopted
SJ/T 11364-2014 — China standard for hazardous substance marking on EEE
GB/T 26572-2011 — Concentration limits for restricted substances in China EEE (aligned with EU RoHS limits for 6 substances)
No Chinese equivalent to EU REACH SVHC Candidate List disclosure obligations for articles

gap.en: Three gaps exist between Chinese domestic requirements and EU RoHS 2 / REACH obligations applicable in Finland: (1) Phthalates — EU RoHS 2 (Directive 2015/863/EU) restricts four phthalates (DEHP, BBP, DBP, DIBP) at 0.1% in homogeneous materials for all EEE categories; China RoHS 2 has not fully adopted this restriction; Chinese-market products may use restricted phthalates in cables, PCB coatings, or housing materials; (2) REACH SVHC disclosure — if a Finnish consumer requests information about an SVHC in a product (under REACH Art. 33), the supplier has 45 days to respond; Chinese exporters are typically not aware of or compliant with this obligation; supply-chain SVHC traceability documentation is often absent for products manufactured solely for the Chinese market; (3) Technical documentation — EU RoHS 2 requires formal technical documentation (EN IEC 63000:2018 recommended) to be prepared and retained; Chinese RoHS marking requirements (SJ/T 11364) do not generate documentation meeting EU RoHS 2 standards. Tukes performs market surveillance in Finland and may test products for RoHS 2 compliance; non-compliant products can be ordered off the market and CE marking can be challenged.
gap.zh: 中国国内要求与适用于芬兰的欧盟RoHS 2 / REACH义务之间存在三项差距：（1）邻苯二甲酸酯——欧盟RoHS 2（指令2015/863/EU）限制所有EEE类别均质材料中四种邻苯二甲酸酯（DEHP、BBP、DBP、DIBP）的含量不超过0.1%；中国RoHS 2尚未完全采纳该限制；面向中国市场的产品可能在线缆、PCB涂层或壳体材料中使用受限邻苯二甲酸酯；（2）REACH SVHC披露——如芬兰消费者就产品中SVHC向供应商提出查询（依据REACH第33条），供应商须在45天内回复；中国出口商通常对此义务不了解或不合规；仅面向中国市场生产的产品通常缺乏供应链SVHC可追溯文件；（3）技术文件——欧盟RoHS 2要求起草并保存正式技术文件（建议参照EN IEC 63000:2018）；中国RoHS标注要求（SJ/T 11364）所产生的文件不满足欧盟RoHS 2标准。Tukes在芬兰进行市场监管，可对产品进行RoHS 2合规检测；不合规产品可被要求下架，CE标志可被质疑。
gap.zht: 中國國內要求與適用於芬蘭的歐盟RoHS 2 / REACH義務之間存在三項差距：（1）鄰苯二甲酸酯——歐盟RoHS 2（指令2015/863/EU）限制所有EEE類別均質材料中四種鄰苯二甲酸酯（DEHP、BBP、DBP、DIBP）的含量不超過0.1%；中國RoHS 2尚未完全採納該限制；面向中國市場的產品可能在線纜、PCB塗層或殼體材料中使用受限鄰苯二甲酸酯；（2）REACH SVHC披露——如芬蘭消費者就產品中SVHC向供應商提出查詢（依據REACH第33條），供應商須在45天內回覆；中國出口商通常對此義務不了解或不合規；僅面向中國市場生產的產品通常缺乏供應鏈SVHC可追溯文件；（3）技術文件——歐盟RoHS 2要求起草並保存正式技術文件（建議參照EN IEC 63000:2018）；中國RoHS標注要求（SJ/T 11364）所產生的文件不滿足歐盟RoHS 2標準。Tukes在芬蘭進行市場監管，可對產品進行RoHS 2合規檢測；不合規產品可被要求下架，CE標誌可被質疑。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — RoHS 2 Directive 2011/65/EU (as amended by 2015/863/EU) is a CE marking precondition; REACH SVHC disclosure obligations apply to all articles in the EU supply chain; enforced by Tukes in Finland
mandatory_status.cn: China RoHS 2 (MIIT Order 32) applies to the Chinese domestic market; phthalate restrictions are not fully adopted; no Chinese REACH equivalent exists

source.publisher: EUR-Lex / Official Journal of the European Union

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] RoHS 2 compliance (including four phthalates under Directive 2015/863/EU) is a precondition for CE marking and is mandatory for wireless devices placed on the Finnish market. China RoHS 2 compliance does not satisfy EU RoHS 2 obligations — particularly for phthalate restrictions and technical documentation requirements. REACH SVHC disclosure obligations apply independently of CE marking. Tukes monitors product compliance in Finland and can order withdrawal for RoHS 2 or REACH violations. Manufacturers should obtain XRF and chemical testing reports from accredited laboratories and prepare RoHS 2 technical documentation to EN IEC 63000:2018.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] RoHS 2合规（包括指令2015/863/EU下的四种邻苯二甲酸酯）是CE标志的前提条件，对投放芬兰市场的无线设备为强制要求。中国RoHS 2合规不满足欧盟RoHS 2义务——特别是邻苯二甲酸酯限制和技术文件要求。REACH SVHC披露义务独立于CE标志适用。Tukes在芬兰监控产品合规，可对RoHS 2或REACH违规产品下令撤市。制造商应从获认可实验室取得XRF和化学检测报告，并按EN IEC 63000:2018准备RoHS 2技术文件。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] RoHS 2合規（包括指令2015/863/EU下的四種鄰苯二甲酸酯）是CE標誌的前提條件，對投放芬蘭市場的無線設備為強制要求。中國RoHS 2合規不滿足歐盟RoHS 2義務——特別是鄰苯二甲酸酯限制和技術文件要求。REACH SVHC披露義務獨立於CE標誌適用。Tukes在芬蘭監控產品合規，可對RoHS 2或REACH違規產品下令撤市。製造商應從獲認可實驗室取得XRF和化學檢測報告，並按EN IEC 63000:2018準備RoHS 2技術文件。
